$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: measurementAttitude2D
description: Two-dimensional, local level, geographic attitude expressed in the locally level NED frame as a rotation about two axes as defined by the reference_frame.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid .

oneOf.description: NE: Local level, geographic attitude expressed in the locally level NED frame as a rotation about the E-axis followed by rotation about the N-axis. Positive rotation follows the right-hand rule.  The third rotation in the NED-frame is unspecified and is not sensed.  Use attitude_3d to report a sensed third dimension that is zero.  See also NED coordinate frame definition for N, E, and D definitions.

ND: Local level, geographic attitude expressed in the locally level NED frame as a rotation about the D-axis followed by rotation about the N-axis. Positive rotation follows the right-hand rule.  The third rotation in the NED-frame is unspecified and is not sensed.  Use attitude_3d to report a sensed third dimension that is zero.  See also NED coordinate frame definition for N, E, and D definitions.

ED: Local level, geographic attitude expressed in the locally level NED frame as a rotation about the D-axis followed by rotation about the E-axis. Positive rotation follows the right-hand rule.  The third rotation in the NED-frame is unspecified and is not sensed.  Use attitude_3d to report a sensed third dimension that is zero.  See also NED coordinate frame definition for N, E, and D definitions.

attitude2d.description: attitude2d: Two-dimensional, local level, geographic attitude.  Units: rad

covariance.description: covariance: Covariance of the measurement.  Units: rad^2

errorModel.description: error_model (enum): Defines an optional error model for other than zero-mean, additive, white Gaussian noise (AWGN).

oneOf.description: NONE: No additional error model provided (num_error_model_params = 0).

numErrorModelParams.description: num_error_model_params: Number of parameters required for the error model chosen.

errorModelParams.description: error_model_params: Error model parameters that characterize the optional error model. Units: various

integrity.description: integrity: Measurement integrity.  Includes the integrity method used and an integrity value (which is to be interpreted based upon the integrity method).  The intent of allowing num_integrity > 1 is to report multiple integrity values based on multiple integrity methods.
